package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "net/http"
    "time"
)

// Negative scenario for cache_interface_method_missing_context: shows the preferred shape for this rule.
// Rule intent: Cache-oriented interfaces whose IO-style methods omit context.Context.
func NegativeCacheInterfaceMethodMissingContext(ctx context.Context, client *http.Client, url string) (*http.Response, error) {
    child, cancel := context.WithTimeout(ctx, time.Second)
    defer cancel()
    req, err := http.NewRequestWithContext(child, http.MethodGet, url, nil)
    if err != nil { return nil, err }
    return client.Do(req)
}
